---
title: "Stephanie J. Lao"
about:
  template: trestles
  links: 
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      url: mailto:stephjlao@gmail.com
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      url: https://www.linkedin.com/in/stephanie-jean-lao/
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      url: https://github.com/stephanielao
  image: img/headshot.jpg
---

## About

I attended graduate school at the University of California, Los Angeles where I obtained my master's degree in applied statistics. Previously, I obtained my bachelor's degree in mathematics and biochemistry with a minor in art from St. Edward's University in Austin, Texas. There, I was awarded a Welch Foundation research scholarship and a presidential merit scholarship.

I have worked as a decision scientist at an advertising agency, a data analyst in the financial services industry, and have conducted research in computational epidemiology as well as environmental data science.

In my free time, I enjoy playing tennis, working on my garden, trying new baking recipes, swimming, and of course spending time with my family and friends.
